code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = tokens.get(i)
    match tok
    when Some(s)
      match string.parse_int(s)
      when Some(n)
        nums = list.push(nums, n)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  let mx = list.max(nums).ok_or("no input")?
  let mn = list.min(nums).ok_or("no input")?
  println("max=#{mx}")
  println("min=#{mn}")
  Ok(())
end
